mustKeep: white muzzle, chest, belly, and legs
gray head, ears, back, sides, and thick rounded tail

frameSpec.background: transparent PNG for final runtime; flat #00ff00 chroma key is acceptable only for intermediate source sheets
frameSpec.looping: loopable where the state is persistent; one-shot transition where noted

actions.name: idle
actions.brief: Sitting calmly, subtle chest breathing, tiny head settling, occasional blink, small ear twitch, tail tip micro-sway.
actions.currentProblem: Motion is minimal and still feels sheet-generated.

actions.name: walk
actions.brief: Natural right-facing four-leg walk cycle, head and shoulder bob, paws contact the ground believably, tail counter-sways.
actions.currentProblem: Exists but should be rebuilt with more realistic gait.

actions.name: walk_left
actions.brief: Exact horizontal mirror of final walk frames.
actions.currentProblem: Structurally correct; regenerate from final walk only.

actions.name: walking
actions.brief: Runtime walking state. Prefer using walk/walk_left directly; keep folder only for validation compatibility if needed.

actions.name: sleep
actions.brief: Curled sleep pose, eyes closed, slow natural breathing, tail wrapped near body, no alert motion.
actions.currentProblem: Exact duplicate of sleepy and sleeping.

actions.name: sleepy
actions.brief: Drowsy transition: eyelids droop, head lowers, posture softens, tiny yawn or slow blink, then settles toward sleep.

actions.name: sleeping
actions.brief: Deep sleep loop: still curled body with only subtle breathing and tiny whisker/ear movement.

actions.name: waking
actions.brief: Wake-up sequence: curled/sleepy start, eyes open, head lifts, small stretch, returns to awake seated posture.

actions.name: surprised
actions.brief: Click reaction: ears perk, eyes widen, head/body recoil upward slightly, paws tense, then recover.

actions.name: shy
actions.brief: Repeated-click reaction: head dips or turns slightly, eyes soften, paws tuck inward, tail wraps closer.

actions.name: dragging
actions.brief: Long-press drag pose: body feels gently lifted or pulled, paws tuck, ears react, tail lags with small sway.

actions.name: waving
actions.brief: Greeting action: one front paw lifts and waves two small beats, head follows, tail tip moves subtly.

actions.name: teaser
actions.brief: Mouse-over teaser interaction: cat tracks a feather toy or cursor, raises paw, swats playfully, body scale stays stable.
actions.currentProblem: Exists but should be refined; visible feather toy choice needs user confirmation.
